title: Antideath-Carpet-addition
description:
Antideath-Carpet-addition is a Carpet Mod extension for Fabric Minecraft servers (versions 1.21.x and 26.1) designed to enhance and optimize the game experience.

It adds a suite of new loggers for server monitoring and game rules for survival, optimizatio
body:
## Antideath Carpet Addition

**A Carpet extension for Fabric servers**

> 🙏 Special thanks to [@_OptiJava_](https://github.com/OptiJava) for guidance

---

### 📦 Supported Versions

| Minecraft Version | Development Status | Latest Supported Version |
|-------------------|--------------------|--------------------------|
| 1.21.x            | Actively updating  | -                        |
| 26.1              | Actively updating  | -                        |

**Requirements:** Carpet Mod + Fabric API

---

####  Server Monitoring Loggers

View real-time server status with `/log` commands. No more guessing when troubleshooting performance issues:

| Logger | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `/log cpu` | Display overall and per-core CPU usage |
| `/log memAllocate` | Monitor JVM memory allocation rate to analyze GC issues |
| `/log network` | View real-time upload/download speed and total traffic |
| `/log sysMemory` | Check physical memory and swap space usage |
| `/log disk` | Monitor disk read/write speed and storage capacity |

#### Rules
[Rules](https://github.com/jfglzs/Antideath-Carpet-addition)
